children.heading: Agreement
children.label: 1 Agreement
children.text: The term “Agreement” means the Dominican Republic-Central America-United States Free Trade Agreement approved by the Congress under .section 4011(a)(1) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: Costa Rica, for such time as the Agreement is in force between the United States and Costa Rica;

children.label: B
children.text: the Dominican Republic, for such time as the Agreement is in force between the United States and the Dominican Republic;

children.label: C
children.text: El Salvador, for such time as the Agreement is in force between the United States and El Salvador;

children.label: D
children.text: Guatemala, for such time as the Agreement is in force between the United States and Guatemala;

children.label: E
children.text: Honduras, for such time as the Agreement is in force between the United States and Honduras; and

children.label: F
children.text: Nicaragua, for such time as the Agreement is in force between the United States and Nicaragua.

children.heading: Commission
children.label: 3 Commission
children.text: The term “Commission” means the United States International Trade Commission.

children.heading: HTS
children.label: 4 HTS
children.text: The term “HTS” means the Harmonized Tariff Schedule of the United States.

children.heading: Textile or apparel good
children.label: 5 Textile or apparel good
children.text: The term “textile or apparel good” means a good listed in the Annex to the Agreement on Textiles and Clothing referred to in , other than a good listed in Annex 3.29 of the Agreement.section 3511(d)(4) of this title
